name: Dinomist Pteran
name_jp: ダイナミスト・プテラン
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
If another "Dinomist" card(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect, you can destroy this card instead.

[ Monster Effect ] 
When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can add 1 "Dinomist" card from your Deck to your hand.
pend_eff: If another "Dinomist" card(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect, you can destroy this card instead.
mnst_eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can add 1 "Dinomist" card from your Deck to your hand.
eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can add 1 "Dinomist" card from your Deck to your hand.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
